findings.context: devices](https://www.statista.com/statistics/973815/worldwide-digital-voice-assistant-in-use/) in use by 2024. ## 8\. AI speech in customer service AI speech technologies are revolutionizing customer service
findings.sentence: The proliferation of voice-assisted devices is evident, with forecasts predicting over [8.4 billion devices](https://www.statista.com/statistics/973815/worldwide-digital-voice-assistant-in-use/) in use by 2024.

[Google's Duplex AI](https://research.google/blog/google-duplex-an-ai-system-for-accomplishing-real-world-tasks-over-the-phone/) system is a prime example, demonstrating advanced contextual understanding by conducting natural conversations to complete tasks over the phone.

[Microsoft Translator](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/translator/blog/2022/04/12/break-the-language-barrier-with-translator-now-with-two-new-languages/) offers real-time translation in over 60 languages, facilitating seamless communication for users worldwide.
[Voice biometric solutions](https://www.pindrop.com/) can reduce fraud by up to 90%, highlighting the security benefits of this technology in protecting user data.

location.heading: 6\. Augmented reality (AR) and AI speech convergence

findings.sentence: [IKEA’s Place app](https://www.ikea.com/global/en/newsroom/innovation/ikea-launches-ikea-place-a-new-app-that-allows-people-to-virtually-place-furniture-in-their-home-170912/) uses AR and AI speech recognition to let users visualize furniture in their homes through voice commands.

The proliferation of voice-assisted devices is evident, with forecasts predicting over [8.4 billion devices](https://www.statista.com/statistics/973815/worldwide-digital-voice-assistant-in-use/) in use by 2024.

Bank of America’s virtual assistant, [Erica](https://promotions.bankofamerica.com/digitalbanking/mobilebanking/erica), uses AI speech technology to assist customers with banking tasks, proving the efficiency of AI in improving customer service interactions.

Continuous learning algorithms have shown a potential performance [improvement of 40%](https://www.nature.com/articles/s42256-019-0080-x) over time, underscoring the adaptive learning capability of AI speech interfaces.
